testcase.name: test_i18n_pwa_keys

failure.message: AssertionError: pwa i18n missing: {'fr': ['refresh_btn', 'refreshing', 'refresh_tooltip', 'update_available_short', 'last_refresh'], 'en': ['refresh_btn', 'refreshing', 'refresh_tooltip', 'update_available_short', 'last_refresh'], 'es': ['refresh_btn', 'refreshing', 'refresh_tooltip', 'update_available_short', 'last_refresh'], 'ar': ['refresh_btn', 'refreshing', 'refresh_tooltip', 'update_available_short', 'last_refresh']} assert not {'ar': ['refresh_btn', 'refreshing', 'refresh_tooltip', 'update_available_short', 'last_refresh'], 'en': ['refresh_btn', 'refreshing', 'refresh_tooltip', 'update_available_short', 'last_refresh'], 'es': ['refresh_btn', 'refreshing', 'refresh_tooltip', 'update_available_short', 'last_refresh'], 'fr': ['refresh_btn', 'refreshing', 'refresh_tooltip', 'update_available_short', 'last_refresh']}
